subject: [PATCH 2/2] nfsd: clear CALLBACK_RUNNING on failed delegation recall queue

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS daemon where a callback is left running even after a recall queue attempt fails, causing subsequent break_lease operations to silently skip the recall and resulting in stalled conflicting opens or locks. The fix involves clearing the CALLBACK_RUNNING bit when the recall queue attempt fails, ensuring that the delegation can be broken as expected.
